name: Berried Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole skinned boned chicken breasts about 1 1/4 lb
10-oz bag spinach, washed and dried with stems removed
1 pint Strawberries, hulled and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1-inch cubes.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté the chicken in 1 tablespoon oil until lightly browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Using a slotted spoon, remove the chicken to a large bowl and let it cool. Reserve the pan drippings in the skillet.
4. Tear the spinach into bite-sized pieces and add it to the bowl with the chicken.
5. Add the cut strawberries and onion.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together vinegar, sugar, poppy seeds, the remaining 2 tablespoons oil, and the reserved pan drippings with salt until well combined.
7. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss lightly to combine.
